commit_message: feat: implement context-aware gesture orb with visual feedback

files.content: Implement context-aware logic, dynamic icon switching (Menu/Back/Wrench), and event guarding.
Ensure it renders Main Nav Links and QuickActionGrid.
Inject <GestureOrb />. Ensure it is hidden on /cashier.

testing_requirements: Verifikasi perubahan ikon saat berpindah halaman. Pastikan Single Tap di halaman Home membuka menu, dan di halaman Inventory kembali ke halaman sebelumnya.
